guarantees.cdxObjects: Every official object tag is parsed and writable; unmodeled objects remain in interchange.cdx.
guarantees.cdxProperties: Every property retains official name/type/tag and exact rawBase64; public lexical types are value-editable.
guarantees.cdxml: Every element and attribute is retained in an editable interchange.cdxml tree and merged on export.
guarantees.nativeAuthority: Source-independent CCJS fields remain authoritative for modeled chemistry and drawing semantics.
guarantees.behavior: Every object, CDX property, unique CDXML attribute, and element-attribute declaration has an official rule plus ChemDraw, codec, contextual, opaque-payload, or explicit unsupported/read-only evidence classification.
guarantees.objectTagErratum: For Geometry through Border, runtime tags follow CDX files written by ChemDraw 12 and 21; the shifted static table remains recorded as publishedTag for auditability.

properties.description: The name of the creator (program user's name) of the document.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The time of object creation.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The name of the program, including version and platform, that created the associated CDX object. ChemDraw 4.0 uses "ChemDraw 4.0" as the value of CreationProgram.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The name of the last modifier (program user's name) of the document.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Time of the last modification.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The name of the program, including version and platform, of the last program to perform a modification. ChemDraw 4.0 uses "ChemDraw 4.0" as the value of CreationProgram.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Required for objecttags. Name of an object.

properties.description: An arbitrary string intended to be meaningful to a user.

properties.description: Back-to-front ordering index in 2D drawing.

properties.description: A registry or catalog number of a molecule object.

properties.description: A string that specifies the authority which issued a registry or catalog number. Some examples of registry authorities are CAS, Beilstein, Aldrich, and Merck.

properties.description: The width, height, and depth of an object in CDX coordinate units (right-handed coordinate system). The precise meaning of this attribute varies depending on the type of object.

properties.description: Signifies whether arrow is a no-go arrow, and the type of no-go (crossed-through or hashed-out) if so. This is an enumerated property.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The radius of the rounded corner of a rounded rectangle.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The type of frame on an object. This is an enumerated property.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The section information (SectionHandle) of the Macintosh Publish & Subscribe edition embedded in the CDX picture object.
properties.formatRule: Official type is uninterpreted bytes; rawBase64 is authoritative.

properties.description: The alias information of the Macintosh Publish & Subscribe edition embedded in the CDX picture object.
properties.formatRule: Official type is uninterpreted bytes; rawBase64 is authoritative.

properties.description: Required for spectra. The spacing in logical units (ppm, Hz, wavenumbers) between points along the X-axis of an evenly-spaced grid.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Required for spectra. The first data point for the X-axis of an evenly-spaced grid.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The type of units the X-axis represents. This is an enumerated property.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The type of units the Y-axis represents. This is an enumerated property.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: A label for the Y-axis.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Required for spectra. The Y-axis values for the spectrum. It is an array of double values corresponding to X-axis values.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The type of spectrum represented. This is an enumerated property.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Y value to be used to offset data when storing XML.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Y scaling used to scale data when storing XML.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The distance of the origin line from the bottom of a TLC Plate, as a fraction of the total height of the plate.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The distance of the solvent front from the top of a TLC Plate, as a fraction of the total height of the plate.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Show the origin line near the base of the TLC Plate if non-zero.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Show the solvent front line near the top of the TLC Plate if non-zero.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Show borders around the edges of the TLC Plate if non-zero.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Show tickmarks up the side of the TLC Plate if non-zero.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The Retention Factor (R f ) of an individual spot.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The length of the "tail" of an individual spot.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Show the spot's Retention Fraction (R f ) value if non-zero..
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The bounding box of upper portion of the Named Alternative Group, containing the name of the group.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The bounding box of the lower portion of the Named Alternative Group, containing the definition of the group.

properties.description: The number of attachment points in each alternative in a named alternative group.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The type of the geometrical feature (point, line, plane, etc.). This is an enumerated property.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The numeric relationship (if any) among the basis objects used to define this object.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Required for geometries and constraints. An ordered list of objects used to define this object.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The constraint type (distance, angle, or exclusion sphere). This is an enumerated property.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The maximum value of the constraint.

properties.description: Signifies whether unconnected atoms should be ignored within the exclusion sphere.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Signifies whether a dihedral is signed or unsigned.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: For a point based on a normal, signifies whether it is in a specific direction relative to the reference point.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The type of property (name, formula, molecular weight, etc.). This is an enumerated property.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The ID of a graphical object used to display the property value.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Whether the property should be recalculated in response to changes in the basis objects.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Represents pairs of mapped atom IDs; each pair is a reactant atom mapped to to a product atom.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: An order list of objects below the arrow in the Reaction Step.

properties.description: Represents pairs of mapped atom IDs; each pair is a reactant atom mapped to to a product atom.

properties.description: Represents pairs of mapped atom IDs; each pair is a reactant atom mapped to to a product atom.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The tag's data type. This is an enumerated property.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The tag will participate in tracking if non-zero.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The tag will be resaved to a CDX file if non-zero.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: The value is a INT32, FLOAT64 or unformatted string depending on the value of ObjectTag_Type.
properties.formatRule: Decode according to the containing object tag's TagType; rawBase64 remains authoritative.

properties.description: How the object should be positioned with respect to its containing object. This is an enumerated property.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Angular positioning, in degrees * 65536.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Offset positioning.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Required for sequences. A unique (but otherwise random) identifier for a given Sequence object.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: An external object containing (as an embedded object) the document containing the Sequence object being referenced.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: An external document containing the Sequence object being referenced.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Required for cross-references.. A unique (but otherwise random) identifier for a given Cross-Reference object.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Required for cross-references.. A value matching the SequenceIdentifier of the Sequence object to be referenced.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Required for templategrids. The height of the viewing window of a template grid.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: Required for templategrids. The number of rows of the CDX TemplateGrid object.

properties.description: Required for templategrids. The number of columns of the CDX TemplateGrid object.

properties.description: The group is considered to be integral (non-subdivisible) if non-zero.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: An array of vertical positions that subdivide a page into regions.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

properties.description: A description of the type of formatting used by the page, or by the splitter. This is an enumerated property.
properties.formatRule: Official lexical/binary codec is available; value is editable.

elements.name: altgroup
elements.contentModel: (objecttag | annotation | t | fragment | group | graphic | bracket)+

elements.name: fragment
elements.contentModel: ((n | b | t | graphic | curve | objecttag | annotation | regnum | coloredmoleculararea)*)

elements.name: group
elements.contentModel: ((t | fragment | group | graphic | altgroup | curve | step | scheme | spectrum | objecttag | annotation | plasmidmap | rlogic | arrow | bioshape)*)

elements.name: page
elements.contentModel: ((t | fragment | group | graphic | altgroup | curve | step | scheme | spectrum | embeddedobject | sequence | crossreference | splitter | table | bracketedgroup | border | geometry | constraint | tlcplate | gepplate | chemicalproperty | arrow | bioshape | stoichiometrygrid | plasmidmap | objecttag | annotation | rlogic)*)
